tasks.subject: Task 1: Add skip parameter to GitService.getGraph
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make getGraph accept a skip offset and pass it to git log --skip=N.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/services/gitService.ts:931-987`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] getGraph(200, 0, {}) produces no --skip arg
- [ ] getGraph(200, 200, {}) produces --skip=200 in git args
- [ ] All existing callers still compile

**Verify:** `npm run check-types` → no errors

**Steps:** Add skip=0 default param; insert --skip=${skip} into args array when skip > 0; fix two internal callers that used old 2-arg form.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/services/gitService.ts", "src/commands/commandController.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check-types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getGraph(200, 0, {}) produces no --skip arg", "getGraph(200, 200, {}) produces --skip=200", "All existing callers compile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add pagination state to StateStore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** StateStore tracks whether more commits exist (_graphHasMore) and exposes loadMoreGraph() to fetch and append the next page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/state/stateStore.ts`
- Create: `src/test/graphPagination.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] loadMoreGraph() on empty state: calls getGraph(200, 0, {}), sets graphHasMore=true when 200 returned
- [ ] loadMoreGraph() called again: calls getGraph(200, 200, {}), appends results
- [ ] loadMoreGraph() receiving partial page: sets graphHasMore=false
- [ ] graphHasMore starts false before any load

**Verify:** `npm test` → all 4 StateStore pagination tests pass

**Steps:** Write 4 failing tests; add _graphHasMore field and graphHasMore getter; update loadGraph() to set _graphHasMore; add public loadMoreGraph() method.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/state/stateStore.ts", "src/test/graphPagination.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadMoreGraph uses skip=0 on first call", "loadMoreGraph uses skip=prevLength on second call", "loadMoreGraph sets graphHasMore=false on partial page", "graphHasMore starts false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add LoadMoreTreeItem to GraphTreeProvider
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The Git Graph TreeView shows a Load More... item at the end of the list when more commits are available.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/providers/graphTreeProvider.ts`
- Modify: `src/test/graphPagination.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] When state.graphHasMore=true, getChildren returns commits + LoadMoreTreeItem
- [ ] When state.graphHasMore=false, getChildren returns commits only
- [ ] LoadMoreTreeItem has contextValue='graphLoadMore', label='Load More...', command='vscodeGitClient.graph.loadMore'

**Verify:** `npm test` → all 6 tests pass; `npm run check-types` → no errors

**Steps:** Add 2 failing tree provider tests; export LoadMoreTreeItem class; update GraphNode type alias; update getChildren root case.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/providers/graphTreeProvider.ts", "src/test/graphPagination.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test && npm run check-types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LoadMoreTreeItem shown when graphHasMore=true", "LoadMoreTreeItem absent when graphHasMore=false", "contextValue is graphLoadMore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire loadMore command and update GraphFilterView controller
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register the vscodeGitClient.graph.loadMore command. Update GraphFilterView to handle loadMore messages and include hasMore in init.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/commands/commandController.ts`
- Modify: `src/views/graphFilterView.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] graph.loadMore command calls state.loadMoreGraph()
- [ ] GraphFilterHandlers has loadMore(): Promise<{commits, hasMore}>
- [ ] IncomingMessage union includes {type: 'loadMore'}
- [ ] handleMessage 'loadMore' case posts appendCommits or loadMoreError
- [ ] postInitial() sends hasMore
- [ ] commandController wires loadMore handler and hasMore in getInitial

**Verify:** `npm run check-types` → no errors

**Steps:** Update GraphFilterHandlers; add to IncomingMessage; update getInitial type; update postInitial; add handleMessage case; register command; update GraphFilterView.open call.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/views/graphFilterView.ts", "src/commands/commandController.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run check-types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["graph.loadMore command registered", "GraphFilterHandlers.loadMore defined", "handleMessage handles loadMore type", "init message includes hasMore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update graphFilterView.hbs webview for scroll pagination
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add IntersectionObserver scroll sentinel, appendRows function, and updatePreviewHeader helper to the Filter Graph webview.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/views/templates/graphFilterView.hbs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] state object has hasMore: false initially
- [ ] init message sets state.hasMore
- [ ] appendCommits message appends new rows (filtered), updates state.commits and header
- [ ] loadMoreError message clears state.loading
- [ ] IntersectionObserver fires only when state.hasMore && !state.loading
- [ ] Header shows 'scroll to load more' suffix when state.hasMore
- [ ] MAX_PREVIEW cap removed

**Verify:** `npm run compile` → no errors; manual smoke test in Extension Development Host

**Steps:** Add sentinel div; remove MAX_PREVIEW, add hasMore to state; add updatePreviewHeader(); update renderPreview(); add appendRows(); update message handler; add IntersectionObserver.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/views/templates/graphFilterView.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "npm run compile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["state.hasMore tracked", "appendCommits appends rows without full re-render", "IntersectionObserver triggers loadMore", "header shows scroll hint"]}
```
